3067390.name: Pirates Slayer
3067390.description:
Pirates Slayer is an exciting 3D action-roguelike game where each level represents a new adventure!
You will have to battle sinister skeletons, collect gold coins, and use them to unlock unique characters and powerful weapons.
Gain experience to become stronger and survive in an endless struggle against the pirate curse.
Are you ready to take on the challenge and become a true pirate slayer?

Features of this game:

Combat System: Players can use a variety of weapons and special skills to fight against skeleton pirates.
Characters: Each character has unique characteristics.
Economy and Shop: Coins collected during adventures can be spent on purchasing new characters, weapons, and upgrades.
3D Graphics
